rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to create an account by entering their details.
The system shall allow users to sign in using a correct username and password.
The system shall enable logged-in users to read blogs shared by recovered patients.
The system shall allow users to update the number of infected people in their area, triggering updates on infection statistics and mask demand.
The system shall enable users in home quarantine to share their information.
The system shall allow doctors to view shared information from quarantined users and suggest medicines.
The system shall enable users to view a list of nearby medical shops and purchase medicines online.
The system shall allow assigning workers to clean an area, updating the cleanliness status accordingly.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user can create an account by entering their details.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they are creating an account, they enter their details.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows the user to sign in with a correct username and password.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When signing in, they enter their username and password. If the details don’t match, they won’t be able to log in. If everything is correct, they can start using the app.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user can read blogs shared by recovered patients after logging in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can read blogs shared by recovered patients and then come back to continue using the app.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user can update the number of infected people in their area, which triggers updates on infection statistics and mask demand.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After that, they can check how many people are infected, how many deaths have happened, or how many masks are needed. If they check the mask demand, shops prepare masks and gloves.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user can share their information while in home quarantine.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A person who is in home quarantine can share their information.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Doctors can view shared information from quarantined users and suggest medicines.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A doctor can view that information and, if needed, suggest medicines. The person can then see what the doctor shared and decide whether to buy medicines.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user can view a list of nearby medical shops and purchase medicines online.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can also view a list of nearby medical shops and buy medicines if needed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows assigning workers to clean an area, updating the cleanliness status accordingly.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Another option is assigning workers to clean an area. After that, the cleanliness status of that area is updated.
